name: AdOff 47 - Content Seed Refresher
description: Daily seed refresh: diagnose tired seeds, discover source ideas (news, competitors, trending), generate fresh content seeds via Gemini Pro, filter brand/size violations, insert new seeds, mark sources used, report to Telegram. Solves Gemini audit caveat: periodic injection of new strategic concepts.

parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as active_count FROM adoff_autopilot.content_seeds WHERE active = true;
SELECT id, seed, used_count, perf_score FROM adoff_autopilot.content_seeds WHERE active = true AND (used_count > 5 OR perf_score < 0.3) LIMIT 50;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.content_seeds SET active = false WHERE active = true AND (used_count > 5 OR perf_score < 0.3);
SELECT title, content FROM adoff_autopilot.news_events WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND used = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT activity_text, happened_at FROM adoff_autopilot.competitor_activity WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT topic_tag, AVG(perf_score) as avg_score FROM adoff_autopilot.content_seeds WHERE active = true AND perf_score > 0 GROUP BY topic_tag ORDER BY avg_score DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT value FROM adoff_autopilot.marketing_config WHERE key = 'top_hashtags' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.news_events SET used = true WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND used = false;
